data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of notifying clients about new provider details. However, there is no evidence provided that confirms this notification process occurs within the saga lifecycle. The linked use case explicitly states the need for client notifications, but the evidence does not demonstrate that such notifications are being sent or that the system is capable of doing so, indicating a clear gap in the implementation.
gaps: No evidence of client notifications being sent to inform about new provider details.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Implement client notification system
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that notifications are sent to clients when a new provider is assigned.
